programme.title: The Surface
programme.desc: Two strangers, both at the end of their rope, suddenly meet in the middle of the unpredictable waters of Lake Michigan.

programme.title: If is a Big Word
programme.desc: It seems to the 35-year-old Yekaterina Kolesnikova that her life got on to the wrong track: instead of being a model on the catwalk in Milan she works in a factory making working clothes. And her husband, a once brilliant and talented musician, has turned out to be a local finance officer. But now Fate suddenly gives Katya a chance to go back seventeen years and try to change her life. Will it make her happy?

programme.title: Life after life
programme.desc: When journalist Masha finally gives up trying to find happiness with Dmitry, an older man who was also her boss, she falls for the much younger Yuri Kozakov - handsome, attentive and seemingly wealthy. But after a hasty marriage, Masha soon begins to notices strange things about Yuri's lifestyle and behaviour. When Yuri leaves for a business trip, Masha hears footsteps in the house and sees a dark shadow in the garden. Soon she will learn Yuri's horrible secret and become threatened by mortal danger, but if she cannot save herself, who will come to her aid in her hour of need?

programme.title: Diamond Cartel
programme.desc: Only one lusted glance brings Aliya to the events throwing her into the criminal ocean. But in the wirliging of passions and turmoil when she finds herself at the verge of fatality it's only her true love that is the only rescue.Now the most important thing for Aliya is to preserve the honor and dignity and the whole world will be at our feet.

programme.title: Revenge Of Robert
programme.desc: Infamous killer doll Robert does battle with Hitler's henchmen aboard a train in Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Mangal Pandey (The Rising)
programme.desc: It is the year 1857. The British are plundering the resources of their Indian subjects, who have reached their breaking point. Soldier Mangal Pandey (Aamir Khan) leads an uprising against India's imperialist occupiers -- events the British call a mutiny and the Indians call a war for independence. Throughout the violent events, Mangal maintains a friendship with Capt. William Gordon (Toby Stephens), who sympathizes with India's subjugated citizens and obeys his conscience.

programme.title: Ragini MMS
programme.desc: A horror film that follows the story of a couple, who visit a secluded farmhouse for a weekend getaway. However, their vacation turns into a nightmare when they realize they are not alone and their intimate moments are being recorded. The movie features suspenseful thrills and explores themes of voyeurism and supernatural terror in a unsettling plot.

programme.title: Koi Aap Sa
programme.desc: A film that centers around a young man who develops feelings for his childhood friend, who is already in a committed relationship. As he tries to move on, he falls in love with another woman. However, things become complicated when his childhood friend realizes her own feelings for him.

programme.title: Patth
programme.desc: Summaries. Avi comes from a poor family and lives with his mother and sister, Nandini. He sees that Nandini has befriended a local gangster by the name of Bhullar, and quietly resents this. When Nandini is killed, Avi and two male friends, Golu and Hari, decide to avenge her death - by killing Bhullar.

programme.title: Simon Bates Golden Hour: 1971
programme.desc: 60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year Gary Barlow, David Tennant & Clare Balding were born. And the UK said goodbye to pounds, shillings & pence as we went decimal!

programme.title: Simon Bates NEW Golden Hour: 1970
programme.desc: Another 60 minutes of hits & headlines from a year of firsts - 18 year olds were allowed to vote in the UK, Hawaii Five-O arrived on the TV & the 747 Jumbo launched from Heathrow!

programme.title: Derek Griffiths: Playschool Disco!
programme.desc: The voice of your childhood Derek Griffiths with 40 of those tunes you pestered your parents to buy - all top pop moments that still bring a smile & happy memories of school days!

programme.title: Magic Moments! The 70s
programme.desc: Experience the magic of the 70s, where every beat was a spell and every song a timeless enchantment!

programme.title: Bruno Brookes-Never Even A Top 10?
programme.desc: Bruno Brookes guides you through the stats in disbelief! Three hours of top tunes from superstars like Bowie, Abba, Bob Marley, Queen, The Who and more. But why didn't we buy 'em?!

programme.title: Punk & Disorderly!
programme.desc: Non-stop 70s songs the cool kids were listening to in the latter half of the decade - expect skinny jeans, safety pins, guitars and just a few snarls!

programme.title: Not A Top 10?! Punk & New Wave
programme.desc: 20 punk & new wave anthems that never made the UK Top 10 - yes really!

programme.title: Christmas No.1s of the 80s!
programme.desc: A fine decade for Christmas chart toppers of all kinds! Including seasonal favourites from Cliff & Shaky, along with unexpected entries from Pet Shop Boys & Jackie Wilson.

programme.title: We're Feelin' Xmas All Over!
programme.desc: This is the soundtrack to your Christmas festivities - 80s style! Only the big party & singalong tunes back to back!

programme.title: The UK's Most Streamed Xmas Songs!
programme.desc: Forget about historical sales - this is the chart that really matters today - Mark Goodier with the most streamed Xmas songs in the last decade, many of them over a billion times!

programme.title: Xmas Party Anthems!
programme.desc: This is the soundtrack to your Christmas festivities - 80s style! Only the big party & singalong tunes back to back!

programme.title: 70s v 80s Xmas Party!
programme.desc: 20 classic seasonal songs - one from the 70s followed by one from the 80s - simple!

programme.title: We're Feelin' Xmas All Over!
programme.desc: This is the soundtrack to your Christmas festivities - 80s style! Only the big party & singalong tunes back to back!

programme.title: Jona Lewie's Cavalry of Xmas Hits
programme.desc: Jona's alternative choice of seasonal classics from the 80s & beyond. Most have a serious message, but all are perfect In the Kitchen at Christmas Parties!

programme.title: Monsters of Rock! 1990-1999
programme.desc: A definitive 6 hour marathon of 90s guitar anthems! From U2 to INXS, Blur to Bon Jovi, Skunk Anansie to Green Day, Metallica to Iron Maiden - 70 rock classics are here, in order!

programme.title: All Killer: Skater Rock!
programme.desc: 25 of the finest skate rock anthems! Expect Avril, O.P.M. Blink 182, Good Charlotte & many more!

programme.title: Weekend Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: 50 Rockstars Of The 00s
programme.desc: The legends and bands that made the 00s rock! Expect anthems from Nickleback, Green Day, Linkin Park, The Arctic Monkeys, Evanescence and many more.

programme.desc: Track List: Love 119, Impossible, One Kiss, 9 Days, Boom Boom Bass, Lucky, Combo, Odyssey, Bag Bad Back, Ember to Solar, Fly Up, Show Me Love, Passage, Midnight Mirage, The End of the Day, Inside My Love, Another Life

programme.title: NCT DREAM The 4th Album 'DREAMSCAPE' Playlist
programme.desc: 10. Off The Wall 8. Heavenly 11. Rains in Heaven6. Best of Me [Track List] 5. No Escape 4. i hate fruits NCT DREAM's 4th full-length album 「DREAMSCAPE」 follows their previous release 「DREAM( )SCAPE」, portraying the group's second journey as they break away from a dark, desensitized reality in search of an ideal dreamlike space. 3. Flying Kiss 2. When I'm With You 9. Night Poem The title 「DREAMSCAPE」 signifies a long-awaited, dreamlike landscape and world, capturing the excitement and freedom of youth within this utopian realm. Across 11 tracks, a dynamic storyline unfolds like a fairytale, vividly portraying the radiant moments of youth in a dramatic way. 1. INTRO : DREAMSCAPE 7. YOU

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.3
programme.desc: Gugak still feels unfamiliar to the members. But they never gave up. Then one day, a gugak expert joins them for an arrangement collab. Sound Trek decides to reinterpret the famous minyo(folk song), “Sarangga” in their own unique style.

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.4
programme.desc: With one-on-one coaching from their mentors and countless hours of repeated practice, their skills have now reached new heights. Then, an exciting piece of news arrives — Sound Trek has been invited to perform at the Uzbekistan National celebration, the homeland of Alex!

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.5
programme.desc: SoundTrek arrived in Uzbekistan with butterflies in their stomachs and successfully completed their performance to the crowd's applause. They proved that music knows no boundaries, and that even non-Koreans can perform gugak if they have enough passion. Their journey, however, is far from over.

programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.578
programme.desc: ILY:1, Lapillus, ICHILLIN', 8TURN, LUN8, VAV, SEONGRI, GreatGuys, Queenz Eye, KISS OF LIFE, Kim Soyeon, BURVEY

programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.591
programme.desc: GHOST9, Billlie, Moon Jong Up, LIGHTSUM, KINGDOM, YOUNITE, ILY:1, XODIAC, Banduni, n.SSign, Queenz Eye, YOUNG POSSE, Jay Chang

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.1
programme.desc: Korea's first gugak band formed by foreign residents <Sound Trek> embarks on its very first journey. From every corner of the world, foreign souls gathered in Korea, united by the timeless sound of gugak. Dreams trebble like the strings of a gayaguem. Before the masters of gugak they compete. Who will be the next five to begin the legend of Sound Trek?

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.2
programme.desc: Finally, the five members of Sound Trek have been selected! From accordion, flute, and Morin Khuur to djembe, and even a Mexican sorikkun (Korean traditional singer), they are now ready to write a new page of gugak. Their mentor, Kwon Songhee, former lead vocalist of the band Leenalchi, believes their potential, supporting every step of their way.

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.3
programme.desc: Gugak still feels unfamiliar to the members. But they never gave up. Then one day, a gugak expert joins them for an arrangement collab. Sound Trek decides to reinterpret the famous minyo(folk song), “Sarangga” in their own unique style.

programme.desc: With one-on-one coaching from their mentors and countless hours of repeated practice, their skills have now reached new heights. Then, an exciting piece of news arrives — Sound Trek has been invited to perform at the Uzbekistan National celebration, the homeland of Alex!

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.5
programme.desc: SoundTrek arrived in Uzbekistan with butterflies in their stomachs and successfully completed their performance to the crowd's applause. They proved that music knows no boundaries, and that even non-Koreans can perform gugak if they have enough passion. Their journey, however, is far from over.

programme.title: Janani
programme.desc: When children are young, parents care for them and give them all they need to live a good life. The circle of life, however, means that one day, it is the children's turn to care for their parents and give them a happy retired life. In the current moral fabric of society, rarely and not often it works out that way. It didn't happen that way with Savita too, as her children had no time to look after her. So she decided not to settle out and reinvent her life. She embarks on a journey to discover herself and to make her own identity as an individual. Janani tells an inspirational story of a mother who rose against all odds and became successful.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Invention Story S02 EP 11
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Robinhood EP 36
programme.desc: Robin's house was burned to ashes by the order of Alwyn, the Baron of Nottingham. Robin and his cousins Will, Winifred and Jenny flee into Sherwood Forest, hoping to escape persecution. They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: Designed to captivate the intelligent young minds from class 5 to 10, EPIC INDIA QUIZ CHALLENGE is a one-of-a-kind quiz competition where teams from schools across India will fight for the crown of having the highest ‘IQ' i.e. India Quotient. The show follows a unique, tailored for a nail-biting climax, format as it tests the contestants' India Quotient, their knowledge of the country- its culture, history, geography, current affairs, and more. Known for his quick wit and charm, popular Bollywood singer and actor Meiyang Chang hosts the show that celebrates India and its diversity.

programme.title: Bharat Ratna The Jewels Of India
programme.desc: Bharat Ratna The Jewels of India is a show that celebrates the recipients of India's highest civilian honour. Through the medium of graphics and information, the show, intends to exhibit hidden unknown and loved stories from lives of these legendary characters.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: The Way Back Home

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: You better board up the windows and secure all the doors, because Mother Nature is back and ready to show you just how powerful she can be, with some of the most electrifying, fiercest, and extreme weather videos you have ever seen!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather. Noun. The state of the atmosphere with respect to heat or cold, wetness or dryness, calm or storm, clearness or cloudiness. As in, "I can't wait to see what kind of weather we have today so I can record it for my favorite TV show, Extreme Weather Countdown."

programme.desc: Jörg and Cheyenne are challenged to build a Rubber Powered Cannon! Cheyenne sets about building the wheels, framework, and crank for the cannon whilst Jörg sets about doing the science behind the rubber! Time to cause some serious carnage!

programme.title: Backyard Ballistics
programme.desc: Jörg and Cheyenne are challenged to build a javelin Launcher. The two work together and build a machine that is so impressive that Jörg thinks it could beat a professional athlete. But will they beat an Olympic medallist in the finale?

programme.title: Battle Factory
programme.sub-title: A Cannon, a Parachute, a Medal, and a Stretcher
programme.desc: A battle tank is only as effective as its gun, and for the Stryker vehicle, that's the M68 105mm cannon. A tube of forged steel will be hammered into the one of the most powerful and famous cannons in modern warfare.

programme.title: Battle Factory
programme.sub-title: A Grenade Launcher, a Flight Simulator, and Ration Packs
programme.desc: The M203 Grenade Launcher is a single shot launcher designed to attach under a rifle barrel. Using the latest technology, bits of plastic and a block of aluminum will be melted, molded, and cut to create a snap-on weapon that increases the firepower in a soldier's hands by a long shot.

programme.title: Wonder
programme.desc: How are Rainbows formed? What does it mean to see a Mirage? And when we see a spinning dancer why one can either perceive as spinning clockwise or counter clockwise?

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The Rhino Orphanage receives a call for help, a calf was stuck in mud for three days, abandoned and unable to walk. Then Karen rushes to a rhino that may need to be euthanized and is possibly pregnant!

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The Hooligans have survived two years of hands-on rehabilitation at the Orphanage and, finally, their traumatic journey is about to reach a happy conclusion. They are proof that orphanages like these can make a difference during these dark times.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: We find out more about the animals that have their feet firmly planted on or under the ground. And find out how their senses are tuned to survive. What we see above the ground is only a small part of the natural world.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: Animals use communication to attract mates,warn off predators, defend territory, or trick their prey. And of course, it's the senses that play the key role - Sight, smell, taste, touch, and hearing - all are employed to send signals to others.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: In this last episode of Super Senses we take the grand final tour to see the greatest of all the special weapons that help some animals to govern the wilderness. In this episode we see it, hear it, touch it, smell it and taste it like animals do.

programme.title: Blue World

programme.desc: Blue World travels to the Bahamas to explore a deep blue hole, then visits the Georgia Aquarium to study Whale sharks who live in a giant tank.

programme.title: Blue Realm

programme.title: Blue Realm

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: Sharks are BIG business in adrenaline eco-tourism. And some thrill seekers deliberately pursue close encounters with deadly sharks – without the protection of a cage. The bigger and more dangerous the shark, the better.

programme.title: Eaten Alive – Human Hands vs. Piranha!
programme.desc: How does it feel to be bitten by piranhas? Coyote tests this freshwater legend with his own hands—and the results are intense.Slow motion never looked this painful. Coyote's hand meets a snapping turtle's jaw in a frame-by-frame breakdown of force and reaction.

programme.title: Stung by 200 Angry Yellowjackets!
programme.desc: 200 angry yellowjackets swarm Coyote during this painful sting challenge. He analyzes the results while barely keeping his cool.A filming prank turns into a police encounter! Coyote gets arrested while making a video—proof that wild adventures sometimes cross the line.

programme.title: PREHISTORIC TREASURE FOUND?!
programme.desc: A surprising discovery leads Coyote on an adventure uncovering prehistoric relics. The episode mixes paleontology, exploration, and thrilling insights into ancient life.

programme.title: Rattlesnake Rattle – You Won't Believe What's Inside!
programme.desc: What's inside a rattlesnake's rattle? Coyote carefully dissects one to reveal the anatomy and how this iconic warning system actually works.Coyote goes in search of the elusive golden trout, a rare species featured in video games and high-altitude streams alike. Will he catch one?

programme.title: Hognose Snake – Will It Bite?!
programme.desc: Hognose snakes are known for their bluffing. Coyote tries to provoke a bite to reveal whether this quirky serpent is all hiss and no bite.A chainsaw meets a mysterious box in this over-the-top unboxing. Coyote takes power tools to presents in a gift-opening like no other.

programme.title: Bitten by a Giant Asian Centipede!
programme.desc: With its venomous fangs and lightning speed, the giant Asian centipede is nightmare fuel. Coyote takes a bite and regrets it instantly.

programme.title: SPIDER-MURDERING WASPS
programme.sub-title: 10 Things You Probably Need to Know!
programme.desc: Coyote dives into the world of parasitic wasps that hunt spiders. He shares ten incredible facts, blending science, storytelling, and edge-of-your-seat wildlife action.

programme.title: Stung Twice – Wasp vs. Hornet!
programme.desc: Coyote takes back-to-back stings from a wasp and a hornet to compare pain levels, venom effects, and which insect really comes out on top.Deep in the wilderness, Coyote uncovers a breathtaking aquatic treasure—dubbed the ‘jewel of the river.' Its iridescence is like no other.

programme.title: Will It Bite?! – Giant Bloodsucking Parasite!
programme.desc: A giant bloodsucking parasite—will it bite? Coyote takes the risk to learn how these creatures latch onto hosts and extract blood.

programme.title: The Dire Wolf Is Alive – Extinction Reversed?
programme.desc: Could dire wolves still roam Earth? Fossil findings and modern sightings are explored in this thrilling, speculative episode.In one of his wildest challenges ever, Coyote dives into an unpredictable stunt. He calls it the craziest thing he's ever done—and he means it.

programme.title: Pinched by an Elephant Beetle!
programme.desc: The elephant beetle is huge, but its pinch may be even bigger. Coyote gets a close-up grip and tests its impressive strength.Coyote samples the infamous snake fruit. With a bizarre smell and unexpected flavor, it's a taste test that challenges more than just the tongue.

programme.title: Stung by the Dragon Flame Caterpillar!
programme.desc: The dragon flame caterpillar may be tiny, but its sting is fiery. Coyote gets up close—and pays the price.Even plants can pack a punch. Coyote explores a Costa Rican bush with stinging leaves that deliver an unexpectedly sharp pain.

programme.title: Blue Iguana Fights Extinction and Wins!
programme.desc: Follow the incredible story of the blue iguana as it defies the odds to survive. Coyote highlights conservation efforts, triumphs, and the resilience of this rare species.

programme.title: Monster Ant Chews to the Bone!
programme.desc: A monster ant with a bite that could rival its name. Mark tests its jaws and explores its defense mechanisms in this up-close challenge.Why does parrot blood look so strange? Coyote analyzes its color, chemistry, and what secrets it may hold about avian evolution.

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever: Holiday Edition
programme.desc: Gusto TV's Wizard of Whatever, Chef Kyle Crawford, is dishing up a holiday feast! There'll be food, fun, elves… and even jolly old St. Nick himself may make an appearance! Join in as Kyle cooks up a Christmas goose complete with stuffing and gravy, plus all the sides and salads, and even a flashy flambé dessert! Merry whatever!

programme.title: Michael Bonacini's Christmas at the Farm
programme.desc: In this heartwarming holiday special, Chef Michael Bonacini invites us to his cozy farmhouse in Ontario for a charming Christmas feast. In this scenic winter retreat, Bonacini interprets classic Welsh and Italian Christmas dishes from his childhood. Michael cooks up comforting dishes from hearty potato leek soup, to succulent roast lamb, to classic molten chocolate lava cake. As he explores homey Christmas flavours, Michael shares his traditions and gives tips for perfecting the holiday meal.

programme.title: Watts Up for the Holidays
programme.desc: Spencer Watts serves up his take on traditional holiday fare, showing us that you can make an impressive dinner without the stress. In this cheerful one-hour special, charming bachelor Spencer takes you through all the planning tips and lets you in on his secrets to create the ultimate holiday meal.

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: The holidays are here! And the holidays come with a lineup of treats you won't be able to resist! From sweet and salty to traditional and unconventional, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: BIG WOW DESSERTS covers it all. To get in the holiday spirit, enchanting host Jessica McGovern introduces two desserts that could impress any Scrooge. First, Jessica bakes a decadent Chocolate Yule Log stuffed with a creamy Salted Caramel Frosting and finishes with a holiday-inspired cake decorated with homemade peppermint candy canes! Interwoven with tricks of the trade, Jessica guides us through her simple yet inspiring treats that are perfect for a big Christmas celebration.

programme.title: One World Kitchen: Our Favourite Holiday Recipes
programme.desc: In this special holiday episode of One World Kitchen, Hana (Japan), Vanessa (Italy), Natalia (Argentina), and Pailin (Thailand) get together to cook their favorite traditional holiday dishes influenced by their respective cultures. Christmas Sushi Rolls, Veal in a Creamy Tuna Sauce with Capers, Striped Bass in Garlic and Lime Marinade, and an epic Timballo. For the final recipe, our hosts combine all the flavors of One World Kitchen into a truly internationally-inspired turkey dish. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bonacini's Italian Christmas
programme.desc: BONACINI'S ITALIAN CHRISTMAS is a heartwarming one-hour holiday special featuring celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini as he shares some of his favourite Italian Christmas Eve dishes. Michael invites us to the set of his series "Bonacini's Italy" to cook up traditional Italian fare like Salt Cod Mousse on Polenta Crostini and Pork Braised in Milk. Michael takes us on a holiday culinary journey as he explores homey Christmas flavours and traditions, offering tips for perfecting dishes from the regions of Veneto, Sardinia, Calabria, Sicily, and Emilia Romagna.

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: Christmas is near, and the pressure is on! Between work, home, friends, and family, the list of people to buy for is endless. To help us through this busy time, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: EDIBLE GIFTS offers up four creative and more personal options to make the holidays cheaper, sweeter, and filled with love. Fun host Jessica McGovern shows us how to bake something for everyone including Crispy Brittle Bark covered in chocolate, rich Coal Cookies that are sweet with a bit of heat, adorable peanut butter-chocolate Reindeer Cupcakes, and easy-to-make Christmas Puzzle Cookies.

programme.title: Spencer's Big Holiday
programme.desc: No matter how you celebrate the holidays, let Spencer Watts help you plan the menu, in SPENCER'S BIG HOLIDAY! In this festive one-hour holiday special, Spencer Watts is serving up some of his favourite holiday meals, treats, and drinks. Follow Spencer as he shows us how to sail through the hectic holiday season with style, from brunch to the moment the clock strikes midnight.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie arrives in Las Vegas in a million dollar Lamborghini SVJ roadster. Taken under the wing of Patrick, founder of the Junkyard Pirates, Alex is brought into the rat rod world - home to American mavericks and outsiders.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz

programme.title: Graveyard Carz

programme.title: Finest Homes

programme.title: Recipe For Love
programme.desc: Chris, Jo and Alice are very active seventy somethings. Will Jo's Venetian style pasta or Alice's Thai chicken curry make the biggest impression on Chris?

programme.title: Home Rescue
programme.desc: Just outside the pretty town of Adare, county Limerick stands the equally picturesque colourful Rainbow Cottage - a tiny, century old estate house.

programme.title: Home Rescue
programme.desc: In Ballyfermot in West Dublin, Róisín, Peter and the crew come to the rescue of deli worker, Linda, whose home is so cluttered she and her two sons can barely get around and she never invites guests in.

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen
programme.desc: Episode 10 takes Duncan to visit the Ancient city of Sukhothai where he cooks a traditional river fish, fried rice in front of this magnificent 800 year old backdrop.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Professional photographer Virginia loves her cottage-style home in the city - but lately it doesn't love her back. A look that was once charming is now dated and in need of a serious makeover, starting with the worn out floors and ancient kitchen appliances. Designer Samantha Pynn applies eco-friendly kitchen ideas, energy saving appliances and 'up-cycles' existing items in the living room to create a beautiful Modern Country oasis in the city.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Olivia's grandmother lived in this house her whole life. When she went into a home about 4 months ago, Olivia couldn't bear to see it sold to a stranger and purchased it. Olivia is thrilled that her fiancé John has happily gone along on this journey with her and would like to please him by fixing up the kitchen and make it comfortable for him to cook in.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye that will provide the most bang for their buck. Each with a big personality of their own, it becomes clear this couple is not going to see eye to eye on what they want. Luckily for them, Sofie is a pro at mediating conflicts when it comes to real estate.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Julie and James are looking for a new home to raise their two boys. James is in the tech industry and would love an energy efficient home. Julie has her own dance studio and can't wait to get back to work after giving birth to her second son. Eve and Shawn are the perfect team for the job, especially with Timberworx's cutting edge "Net-Zero" project.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: Funky chef, Melvyn Lee, begins his culinary journey in Pampanga, Philippines. Known as the culinary centre of the Philippines, Pampanga is the place to go for foodies. Here, Melvyn visits two very different families- a celebrity artist, and a tribal chief, and experiences the Filipino life and cuisine in a whole new light.

programme.title: Design For You: Trends
programme.desc: We step into the home of Justice Mukheli. We give you tips to upgrade your bedroom and then Karen from Home Studio, shows us an interior she recently designed.

programme.title: Epic Trails

programme.title: Americanos

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Luke Hopkins and Alex Kellar explore the rugged Oregon Coast by sea kayak, SUP and whitewater kayak.

programme.title: Facing Waves

programme.title: USA Through the Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Place is inextricably linked to who we are as human beings. See the American Great Outdoors in its purest and most authentic light – through the eyes of locals.

programme.title: Facing Waves
